Now I want to teach you some rules about using existing symbols in the table to create new combinations.

1.We do not want the symbols on both sides of the
minus and division signs to be the same, as they will cancel out. For example, $s-s$ and $v/v$ are not allowed.

2.Importantly, the left and right sides of the add and sub signs must be in the same unit. For example, $s$ and $v$
cannot add or
subtract from each other, because they have units m and m/s respectively, so $s-v$, $s-v0$ and $s+alpha$ are prohibited.
